message:
chore: bump version to 0.9.4

Changes in this release:
- fix(linux): Ctrl shortcuts and clean exit on Linux
- fix(linux): enable screencast over SSH by using desktop display
- fix(linux): resolve WebSocket deadlock and build issues
- fix(linux): improve cross-platform compatibility
- fix: prevent white bar flash on startup

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.9.3",
+  "version": "0.9.4",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
